curation_notes: The patch commit is the merge of PR #10 into rustgd/glsl-layout master. Only src/array.rs was modified. The vulnerability is in the map_array function defined inside the impl_array macro: it uses ptr::read to move elements out of the source array and mem::forget to suppress the array's destructor, but if the user-provided callback f panics, forget is never reached and the array's destructor double-drops already-moved elements. The fix wraps the source array in ManuallyDrop to prevent automatic cleanup on panic. CWE-415 (Double Free) was pre-assigned as use-after-free, which is the closest available class — retained as-is.
